questions.question: Does DEFAULT_BLOSSOM_SERVERS contain exactly https://cdn.satellite.earth with label 'Satellite CDN'?
questions.actionable_check: Read the DEFAULT_BLOSSOM_SERVERS constant in BlossomServerService.ts and verify its contents
evidence_required: Unit test that asserts constant values
questions.pass_criteria: Constant contains exactly one entry: { url: 'https://cdn.satellite.earth', label: 'Satellite CDN' }

questions.question: Does initializeDefaults insert the default server with position 0 for the given identity?
questions.actionable_check: Read initializeDefaults method body and verify it inserts with correct position. Run test that creates defaults and checks position.
questions.pass_criteria: Method inserts with position=0, test confirms servers[0].position === 0

questions.question: Is initializeDefaults idempotent - does it skip initialization if servers already exist?
questions.actionable_check: Read initializeDefaults and verify it checks for existing servers before inserting. Run idempotency test.
evidence_required: Source code showing early return when servers exist
questions.pass_criteria: Method returns early without modification when listServers returns non-empty array

questions.question: Is initializeDefaults called from NostlingService.createIdentity() after relay config initialization?
questions.actionable_check: Read createIdentity method and verify the blossomServerService.initializeDefaults call exists in the right location
evidence_required: Source code of createIdentity showing the initializeDefaults call
Position relative to relay config initialization
questions.pass_criteria: initializeDefaults is called with npubToStore after relay config initialization, wrapped in try/catch with warn logging

questions.question: Is BlossomServerService wired to NostlingService in index.ts via setBlossomServerService?
questions.actionable_check: Read index.ts and verify setBlossomServerService is called after BlossomServerService is created and initialized
evidence_required: Source code showing setBlossomServerService call in index.ts
Order of operations (after initialize, before other services)

mandatory_questions.question: Are there any dead code artifacts (unused exports, unreachable code paths) introduced by this story?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Check if DEFAULT_BLOSSOM_SERVERS and initializeDefaults are actually used. Check if setBlossomServerService is called.
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: All new code is reachable and used - no dead exports, no unreachable branches

mandatory_questions.question: Do all existing BlossomServerService tests still pass? Are there any regressions in identity creation tests?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Run npm test and verify total test count increased (baseline: 2841 passing) with 0 failures
evidence_required: Full test suite output showing pass count
No regression in existing test descriptions
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: Test count increased by at least 5 (new tests), 0 failures, 0 regressions

mandatory_questions.question: Does the change maintain backward compatibility - existing identities without blossom servers are unaffected?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Verify initializeDefaults is only called during createIdentity (not on startup or for existing identities). Check idempotency test.
evidence_required: Code path analysis showing initializeDefaults only triggered by createIdentity
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: initializeDefaults only called from createIdentity flow, idempotency test passes, no startup initialization
